006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.request;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
025
026/**
027 * Default immutable implementation of {@link HttpRequestLine}.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
031 * <p class='bjava'>
032 *    <jc>// GET /users/123 HTTP/1.1</jc>
033 *    HttpRequestLine <jv>rl</jv> = HttpRequestLineBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"GET"</js>, <js>"/users/123"</js>);
034 *
035 *    <jc>// Custom protocol version</jc>
036 *    HttpRequestLine <jv>rl2</jv> = HttpRequestLineBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"POST"</js>, <js>"/api/echo"</js>, HttpProtocolVersion.<jsf>HTTP_2_0</jsf>);
037 * </p>
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
041 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
042 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
043 * (and possibly earlier).
044 * For production use cases that require long-term binary stability, continue using the existing
045 * {@code juneau-rest-client} and {@code juneau-rest-common} APIs until the {@code ng} stack is declared stable.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
049 * </ul>
050 *
051 * @since 10.0.0
052 */
053public final class HttpRequestLineBean implements HttpRequestLine {
054
055   private final String method;
056   private final String uri;
057   private final HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion;
058
059   private HttpRequestLineBean(String method, String uri, HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion) {
060      this.method = assertArgNotNull("method", method);
061      this.uri = assertArgNotNull("uri", uri);
062      this.protocolVersion = assertArgNotNull("protocolVersion", protocolVersion);
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * Creates an {@code HTTP/1.1} request line with the given method and URI.
067    *
068    * @param method The request method (e.g. {@code "GET"}). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
069    * @param uri The request URI. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
070    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
071    */
072   public static HttpRequestLineBean of(String method, String uri) {
073      return new HttpRequestLineBean(method, uri, HttpProtocolVersion.HTTP_1_1);
074   }
075
076   /**
077    * Creates a request line with the given method, URI, and typed protocol version.
078    *
079    * @param method The request method. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
080    * @param uri The request URI. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
081    * @param protocolVersion The protocol version. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
082    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
083    */
084   public static HttpRequestLineBean of(String method, String uri, HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion) {
085      return new HttpRequestLineBean(method, uri, protocolVersion);
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Creates a request line with the given method, URI, and parsed protocol version.
090    *
091    * @param method The request method. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
092    * @param uri The request URI. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
093    * @param protocolVersion The protocol version string (e.g. {@code "HTTP/2"}). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
094    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
095    */
096   public static HttpRequestLineBean of(String method, String uri, String protocolVersion) {
097      return new HttpRequestLineBean(method, uri, HttpProtocolVersion.parse(protocolVersion));
098   }
099
100   @Override /* HttpRequestLine */
101   public String getMethod() {
102      return method;
103   }
104
105   @Override /* HttpRequestLine */
106   public String getUri() {
107      return uri;
108   }
109
110   @Override /* HttpRequestLine */
111   public HttpProtocolVersion getProtocolVersion() {
112      return protocolVersion;
113   }
114
115   @Override /* Object */
116   public String toString() {
117      return method + ' ' + uri + ' ' + protocolVersion;
118   }
119
120   @Override /* Object */
121   public boolean equals(Object obj) {
122      return (obj instanceof HttpRequestLineBean o2) && eq(this, o2, (x, y) ->
123         eq(x.method, y.method) && eq(x.uri, y.uri) && eq(x.protocolVersion, y.protocolVersion));
124   }
125
126   @Override /* Object */
127   public int hashCode() {
128      return Objects.hash(method, uri, protocolVersion);
129   }
130}
